data.title: EdgeRunner Releases “WarClaw” for Agentic Decision Dominance at the Tactical Edge
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, EdgeRunner AI, a prominent company specializing in military-focused on-device artificial intelligence, has unveiled the EdgeRunner WarClaw. This innovative product serves as a robust agentic orchestration layer built upon the widely embraced OpenClaw agent framework. Tailored for military personnel navigating connected as well as Denied, Disconnected, Intermittent, and Low-bandwidth (DDIL) landscapes, WarClaw empowers frontline operatives with autonomous digital capabilities. The launch signifies a significant advancement in enhancing operational efficiency for warfighting units.

data.title: Algorhythm Holdings to Announce its Financial Results for the Full Year 2025
data.description: Fort Lauderdale, FL-based Algorhythm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIME), a prominent AI technology firm, is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the entire year 2025 on April 2, 2026. An earnings call hosted by management is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial results and offer insights on the company's operations. This event comes after the company announced its intentions to share its annual figures.

data.title: Merit Medical Acquires View Point Medical, Inc., expanding the Merit Therapeutic Oncology Portfolio
data.description: In South Jordan, Utah, on April 01, 2026, Merit Medical Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MMSI), a key player in healthcare technology, reported the acquisition of View Point Medical, Inc. (View Point). Following a merger, View Point is now under the ownership of Merit as a subsidiary. View Point, based in Carlsbad, California, is known for producing the OneMark ® Detection Imaging System and OneMark Tissue Markers. The total transaction amount, inclusive of ViewPoint's debts, stands at roughly $140 million. Out of this sum, $90 million was settled in cash during the closing, while two deferred payments of $25 million each are scheduled to be disbursed no later than the first and second anniversaries of the closing date.

data.title: Seanergy Maritime Announces Availability of its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Glyfada, Greece, on April 1, 2026, Seanergy Maritime Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SHIP) disclosed the submission of their Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. This filing has been made with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and is now available on the company's website, www.seanergymaritime.com, in the "Investor Relations" section under "Financial Reports."

data.title: AVIATOR NATION AND WE ARE ENOUGH UNITE ON A LIMITED-EDITION BRACELET AHEAD OF MENTAL HEALTH AWARENESS MONTH
data.description: Paige and Blake Mycoskie, siblings, have recently unveiled their initial collaboration. Aviator Nation has joined forces to back Blake's initiative, We Are ENOUGH, which serves as a symbol of self-worth. The proceeds from this partnership will be dedicated to supporting mental health organizations. The announcement took place in New York on April 1, 2026.

data.title: QIND Reports FY 2025 Results: 45.9% Revenue Growth, Core Turnaround Action Highlights
data.description: The updated press release from Quality Industrial Corp. is being issued to replace the previous release issued on March 31, 2026 at 6:20 AM Eastern Time. The earlier version contained errors and inaccuracies and did not reflect the final approved information.

data.title: Bain & Company appoints Hernan Saenz to lead its Global Strategy & Transformation practice
data.description: In Boston on April 1, 2026, Bain & Company appointed Hernan Saenz as the new head of its Global Strategy & Transformation Practice. This decision solidifies Bain's dedication to leading in strategic thinking and business transformations worldwide.

data.title: High Tide Subsidiary NuLeaf Naturals Pursues Participation in U.S. Medicare CBD Pilot Launching Today
data.description: NuLeaf Naturals is primed to act as a supplier for entities involved in the CMS Innovation Center's Beneficiary Engagement Incentive. Based in Calgary, AB, this development comes as High Tide Inc. (HITI) prepares to leverage its position for potential partnerships. HITI is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol HITI, as well as on the TSXV and FSE.

data.title: Forbes Advisor Names National Debt Relief the Best Debt Relief Company for 2026
data.description: A reputable debt settlement firm has secured the leading position for the fourth consecutive year. National Debt Relief, known for debt settlement services and offering the top-rated debt relief solution in the U.S., was recognized by Forbes Advisor as the Best Debt Relief provider. This marks the company's continued success in the industry.

data.title: Lands' End Board Authorizes $100 Million Share Repurchase Program
data.description: In Dodgeville, Wisconsin, on April 1, 2026, Lands’ End, Inc. (NASDAQ: LE) revealed plans for a stock repurchase program. The Board of Directors approved the buyback of up to $100 million worth of the company's common stock. This initiative is set to be executed from April 1, 2026, until March 31, 2029. Lands' End has the flexibility to buy back its shares through various methods such as open market purchases, privately negotiated transactions, or compliant approaches as per federal securities laws.

data.title: Veeam Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
data.description: A company based in Seattle, Veeam, has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the field of backup and data protection platforms in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’. This recognition underscores their dedication to providing quality services as acknowledged by customers.

data.title: PAN Expands AI Client Roster and Launches Proprietary AI Search Visibility Audit as Demand for Brand Credibility Surges
data.description: In Boston, PAN recently revealed a significant achievement, with a slew of new client acquisitions and the introduction of an exclusive AI Optimization tool. This development showcases the agency's ongoing success in the B2B sector.

data.title: Ridge Security Earns Frost & Sullivan's 2026 New Product Innovation Recognition for RidgeBot®
data.description: In Silicon Valley, California, Ridge Security has been awarded the Frost & Sullivan 2026 Global New Product Innovation Recognition for their Automated Security Validation technology. This prestigious award recognizes companies that excel in addressing crucial security issues and setting new benchmarks in the industry. Frost & Sullivan conducted a thorough evaluation of solutions, focusing on innovation, product performance, and customer impact. Ridge Security's primary product, RidgeBot®, showcased exceptional qualities leading to this recognition.

data.title: Town Lane and Gillon Property Group have purchased Watters Creek Village.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has reached 8.2%, affecting over 15 million individuals in the country. This significant increase is attributed to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the GDP has decreased by 5.6%, reflecting the challenges faced by businesses and industries. Many experts believe that government intervention is crucial to mitigate the impact on the workforce and the overall economy. The situation calls for urgent measures to address the rising unemployment and stimulate economic growth.

data.title: Hampton plans to issue shares to settle debt, involving approximately 200 million shares.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.7%, which is the lowest in the past five years. The report also mentioned that the economy added over 200,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 3.2% compared to last year. These positive economic indicators have led to a boost in consumer confidence and optimism about future job prospects.

data.title: Edible Garden Named to 2025 FoodTech 500 Global Rankings for Innovation and Sustainability Leadership for the Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: Company's progress in AgriFoodTech, sustainable Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) solutions, and Farm to Formula® method has been acknowledged. This recognition underscores the company's ongoing development in these areas.
